creator: wcarson.bugzilla@disillusion.net
text: As another point, with textproc/py-chardet updating to 4.0.0 today, www/py-requests now breaks upon startup. This prevented me from building devel/cmake (not exactly sure why it's a requirement, but alas). I updated the Makefile to use 2.25.1 with no patches and everything built successfully.
